buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/portfolio run build && mkdir -p .vercel/output/static && cp -r artifacts/portfolio/dist/public/. .vercel/output/static/ && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('.vercel/output/config.json', JSON.stringify({version:3,routes:[{src:'/assets/(.*)',headers:{'Cache-Control':'public, max-age=31536000, immutable'},continue:true},{handle:'filesystem'},{src:'/(.*)',dest:'/index.html'}]},null,2))"
